software.name: cpm22a
software.notes: Contains Disk Basic GOMOKU.COM: "Bdos Err: Select"

software.name: develop
software.notes: Boots only if any disk is in drive B (?)

software.name: filer14j
software.notes: File viewer, useful for executing non autobootable disks in drive B:

software.name: hellobas
software.notes: [FDC] "Error(161): Bad disk sector" on most if not all BASIC programs

software.name: kanjicpm
software.notes: Unreadable graphics, should require [kanji] hookup

software.name: kanjicpma
software.notes: Unreadable graphics, should require [kanji] hookup

software.name: smcdos
software.notes: Not extensively tested, may be incomplete?

software.name: houryuji
software.notes: Disk 1: [FDC] Error(161): Bad disk sector" Disk 2 is kinda bootable with black screen on title but then asks for a number (manual copy protection)

software.notes: All games: claims to hit [keyboard] space for instructions but doesn't work (games starts with joystick anyway)

software.name: compbas
software.notes: Collection of SMC-70 games (not entirely compatible with SMC-777?) SLOTMAN.BAS: "Error(131) in 500: undefined variable" TYPE.BAS: [keyboard] tester GAME&TYP.BAS: same as TYPE.BAS with no graphic layer

info.value: Load with filer14j in drive A: and this in B:

software.name: smcshogi
software.notes: [keyboard] selects King even if the intention is to move anything else NOTE: in shougi you can move King only on check before checkmate (wtf?)

software.name: suprgolf
software.notes: Cannot start a game, [keyboard]?

software.name: yakyukyo
software.notes: [FDC] Crashes after displaying "ヤキュウキョウ" d88: Floppy disk has excess of heads for this drive that will be discarded (floppy heads=2, drive heads=1)

software.name: yakyukyoa
software.notes: [MC6845] bad colors on graphic layer (same as nobunaga?)

software.name: younazo
software.notes: Stuck [buzzer] Doesn't clear [MC6845] graphic layer properly ([FDC]?)

software.name: chima
software.notes: [MC6845] heavy GFX split issues during gameplay

software.name: cookcat
software.notes: Apparently a cooking application, not extensively tested (language barrier, katakana only)

software.name: graphed
software.notes: [keyboard] only? Doesn't seem to control right

software.name: flopmag2
software.publisher: ソニー・クリエイティブプロダクツ (Sony Creative Products)
software.notes: Disk A 3. [FDC] "Error(161) in 1220: Bad disk sector" 4. [FDC] "Error(161) in 1320: Bad disk sector" Disk B 1. untested (language barrier) 3. [keyboard] unresponsive 5. [FDC] "Error(161) in 1400: Bad disk sector" when striking space key

[FDC] "Error(161): Bad disk sector" 4. [FDC] "Error(161): Bad disk sector" 5. [FDC] "Error(161): Bad disk sector"

software.publisher: ソニー・クリエイティブプロダクツ (Sony Creative Products)
software.notes: Disk A 2. white screen 3. [keyboard] unresponsive 4. white screen 5. untested Disk B [FDC] "Bad disk sector"

[FDC] "Error(161) in 660: Bad disk sector"

software.notes: Disk A 2. white screen 3. untested (language barrier) Disk B 1. untested (language barrier) 2. white screen 3. white screen 6. [keyboard] unresponsive, prompts for a paddle 8. eventually black screen

software.name: flopmag7
software.publisher: ソニー・クリエイティブプロダクツ (Sony Creative Products)

software.notes: [keyboard] locks up after few moves

software.name: readrom
software.notes: Utility to read and dump system ROM, likely unofficial

info.name: usage
info.value: Load with filer14j in drive A: and this in B:

software.name: toshogi
software.notes: Requires a working Disk Basic to be loadable (has only a SHOGI.BAS)

software.name: comp1
software.notes: BR17, FRUIT, GHOST: "Disk read error (Bad Sector)" (bad dump?)

info.name: usage
info.value: vortex: remove mouse in joystick port 1

software.name: comp2
software.notes: HETZER: Uneven [MC6845] display during gameplay STRIKER2: "Disk read error (Bad Sector)" (bad dump?)

software.name: comp3
software.notes: MAC: stuck [buzzer] [FDC] fails on several basic utilities Not extensively tested

software.name: compinv
software.notes: Starts in CP/M 1.2J (cfr. cpm22a), but just has three games I.COM and INVADERS.COM: doesn't start a game on [keyboard] enter strike MAHJONG.COM: Unresponsive [keyboard] after first tile discarded

software.name: comprf
software.notes: GALAXIAN: unresponsive [keyboard], works with joystick GUNMAN.BAS: unresponsive [keyboard] F keys
